name: Madeline Celeste (Futa? No, not really)
description:
Basically the previous bot I made, but like... a la penis as some people requested.

I decided, "fuck it, I'm using this other image that I have around" so, the intro is nsfw, got it? Don't complain, you're eating good this Christmas

Will I make a sfw version with a la penis?

No, I don't want to just do a complete copy paste, I wanna change things up even a little bit.

If you want to be Badeline in this, use a persona

Have fun my pookies, I love you all equally and in a platonic way, Merry Christmas eve

Update: something something guidelines. Madeline Celeste, cencored with Celeste meme from the Celeste official Discord server.

This sucks
